scripts.dev: concurrently --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3001/api/health --timeout 30000 && npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
